steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Gradle 빌드 설정 완료 (settings.gradle, build.gradle, gradlew), Spring Boot 스켈레톤(MarketplaceApplication.java, application.yml), React/Vite 프론트엔드 초기화 완료 (frontend/package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tailwind, App.tsx 등)

steps.name: domain-layer
steps.summary: JPA 엔티티 4종(User, Prompt, Purchase, RefreshToken) + 열거형 2종(PromptType, TargetRole) 생성 완료

steps.name: auth-layer
steps.summary: JWT(JwtProvider, JwtFilter) + OAuth2(OAuth2UserService, OAuth2SuccessHandler) + SecurityConfig 구현 완료, JwtProviderTest 통과

steps.name: repository-layer
steps.summary: 4개 JPA 리포지토리(UserRepository, PromptRepository, PurchaseRepository, RefreshTokenRepository) + PromptRepositoryTest 구현 완료

steps.name: prompt-service
steps.summary: PromptService 구현 완료 (콘텐츠 접근 제어, previewContent 자동 생성, 50KB 제한), PromptNotFoundException/UnauthorizedException 예외 클래스, PromptServiceTest 5개 케이스 통과

steps.name: purchase-service
steps.summary: PurchaseService + PurchaseEventHandler(downloadCount 비동기 증가) 구현 완료, PurchaseServiceTest 통과

steps.name: api-layer
steps.summary: AuthController, PromptController, PurchaseController, GlobalExceptionHandler, SpaController 구현 완료, PromptControllerTest 통과

steps.name: frontend-foundation
steps.summary: TypeScript 타입 정의, Axios 클라이언트(JWT 인터셉터+401 재발급), API 함수(prompts.ts, purchases.ts), React Router 라우팅 + PrivateRoute 구현 완료

steps.name: frontend-pages
steps.summary: 전체 페이지(Login, Callback, Home, PromptDetail, Upload, MyPage) + 공통 컴포넌트(PromptCard, FilterBar, PromptPreview, TagBadge) 구현 완료, 빌드 성공
